login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.googleFailed: Couldn’t complete the Google sign-in. Try again.
login.switchToSignup: Don’t have an account? Sign up

signup.subtitle: Create your account
signup.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

google.connected: Google connected your account. Choose how to use Holy Oly.

acceptTerms: I’ve read and accept the <0>terms</0> and the <1>privacy policy</1>.
mustAcceptTerms: You must accept the terms and the privacy policy.

errors.weakPassword: The password must be at least {count} characters and not a very common one.
errors.shortPassword: The password must be at least {count} characters.
errors.emailTaken: That email already has an account. Try signing in.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.intro: If the email exists, we sent you a link (check spam too).
forgot.done: Done. If the email is registered, you’ll receive instructions shortly.

verify.ok: Email verified. You can keep using Holy Oly.
verify.expired: The link expired or was already used.

onboarding.title: Welcome — here’s how you get around

coach.0: This is your Roster: each athlete and their readiness status (green / amber / red).
coach.1: Tap an athlete to see their detail: load, recovery, and progress for the year.
coach.2: In Macros you pick a macrocycle and assign it to an athlete.
coach.3: In Invitations you share your code so your athletes can link up.

atleta.0: This is Today: your wellness check-in and your plan for the day.
atleta.1: Tap “Start training” and log set by set; the plates show you how to load the bar.
atleta.2: In My progress you track your evolution.
atleta.3: In Account you’ll find your data and your linked coach.
